# Batch Community Sample: English

- 2026-06-11 Reddit smallbusiness: Manually checking support chats in a spreadsheet takes hours every week. A cheap export would save time.

- 2026-06-10 Product Hunt review: I would pay for a simple weekly QA report, but the current tools are too expensive and setup is too slow.

- 2026-06-09 Founder forum: We copy conversations by hand on Fridays and training feedback is always late.
